title: Add GM commands for 修仙 plugin

description: Add GM_ADMINS config and permission check
details: 1. Add GM_ADMINS array to _conf_schema.json under ACCESS_CONTROL. 2. In XiuXianPlugin.__init__, load self.gm_admins from config.get('ACCESS_CONTROL', {}).get('GM_ADMINS', []). 3. Add _check_gm_admin(event) method returning bool. Verification: grep GM_ADMINS in _conf_schema.json and main.py; run a quick smoke test.
notes: Added GM_ADMINS to _conf_schema.json under ACCESS_CONTROL; loaded self.gm_admins in XiuXianPlugin.__init__; added _check_gm_admin(event) method.

description: Create core GM manager with target resolution
details: Create core/gm_manager.py with GMManager. Implement target resolution: At segment -> numeric user_id -> sender. Include a _log_operation helper. Verification: import GMManager, call _resolve_target with mocked event.
notes: GMManager created with target resolution and dispatcher

details: In GMManager implement 设置境界 (validate realm name against ConfigManager level_data and body_level_data), 设置修为, 设置灵石, 设置气血, 设置真元, 设置攻击, 设置精神力. Use db.update_player. Verification: unit tests for realm resolution and numeric setters.
notes: Attribute modification commands implemented with realm validation

details: Implement 给予装备, 给予物品 (quantity default 1) using StorageRingManager.store_item; 卸下装备 using EquipmentManager.unequip_item with storage fallback. Verification: unit tests with mocked storage ring and equipment managers.
notes: Item/equipment give and unequip commands implemented

description: Implement clear CD and forced settlement commands
details: Implement 清除CD requiring '确认' arg, syncing user_cd and player.state. Implement 触发历练结算 and 触发秘境结算 by setting user_cd.scheduled_time to now and delegating to AdventureManager.finish_adventure / RiftManager.finish_exploration. Verification: unit tests for state checks and forced settlements.
notes: Clear CD with confirmation and forced settlements with bounty progress

description: Implement spawn boss GM command and audit logging
details: Implement 生成Boss delegating to BossManager. Implement JSON-line logging to plugin data dir with 500MB rotation. Verification: log file created and rotated; boss spawn calls manager.
notes: Spawn boss, audit logging, and 500MB log rotation implemented

description: Create GM handler and register commands
details: Create handlers/gm_handler.py with GMHandler. Register CMD_GM = '修仙GM' and CMD_GM_HELP = '修仙GM帮助' in main.py. Initialize gm_handler in __init__. Export from handlers/__init__.py. Verification: plugin loads without error; /修仙GM帮助 responds.
notes: GMHandler created and commands registered in main.py

description: Update help text and version info
details: Update handlers/misc_handler.py to list 修仙GM帮助 with GM-only marker. Update metadata.yaml version and README.md changelog. Verification: help text shows entry; version bumped.
notes: Help text updated, version bumped to v3.2.0, README updated

details: Run uv run ruff format . && uv run ruff check . and uv run python -m pytest tests/ -v. Fix any issues. Verification: both commands exit 0.
notes: All tests pass (125 passed), ruff clean on changed files
